title: Implement multi-file splitting for large decks
description: In thumbnails.py, implement the top-level generate_thumbnails() function that chunks slides into groups of at most cols × (cols + 1), calls assemble_grid() for each chunk, writes JPEG files (single file with no suffix, or -1/-2/… suffixes for multiple chunks), and returns all output file paths.
acceptance_criteria: A deck with ≤ cols × (cols + 1) slides produces a single output file with no numeric suffix
A deck exceeding that threshold produces multiple files suffixed -1, -2, …
Each chunk contains at most cols × (cols + 1) slides
All produced file paths are returned as a list
Output files are written as JPEG
